summary: The CI failed when attempting to push a branch to GitHub: the git push command exited with code 128 after GitHub returned an HTTP 403 error, causing the job to fail.
root_cause: git push failed because GitHub returned HTTP 403 (access denied) when attempting to access https://github.com/vercel/next.js/, causing the git command to exit with code 128.

evidence.quote: Error: Command failed with exit code 128 (Unknown system error -128): git push origin update/react/19.3.0-canary-142cfde8-20260422
evidence.reason: Shows the failing command was git push and it exited with code 128.

evidence.quote: "fatal: unable to access 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/': The requested URL returned error: 403"
evidence.reason: Demonstrates GitHub returned an HTTP 403 (permission/authorization) error when accessing the repository URL.
Corroborates the git command failure and the reported exit code name associated with the push failure.

suggested_fix: Ensure the CI has valid credentials with push/write permission for the repository (e.g., configure GITHUB_TOKEN or a personal access token with repo access and make sure it's available to the job), verify the remote URL is correct and authenticated, and re-run the workflow.
